* 2.传入的提示符字符串内部不能包含双引号，否则会导致Wonder: *       2. The prompt string passed in must not contain double quotes, otherwise WonderLLM will fail to parse it
* 3.涉及较长字符串（尤其是中文）的传输，必须使用调用IIC_Co: *       3. When transferring long strings (especially Chinese), IIC_Config_MCP_Transmit must be called to set the IIC rate
* 提升至400,000，否则WonderLLM将无法完整接收数: *         up to 400,000, otherwise WonderLLM will not be able to receive the data completely
* 4.模块完成配网前(白色滚动条消失出现表情界面)，该功能无效: *       4. Before the module finishes network provisioning (the white progress bar disappears and the emoji interface appears), this function has no effect

* @brief 向WonderLLM模块注册所有可用的工具(功能): * @brief Register all available tools (functions) with the WonderLLM module
* @note 涉及较长字符串（尤其是中文）的传输，必须使用调用IIC_Con: * @note  When transferring long strings (especially Chinese), IIC_Config_MCP_Transmit must be called to set the IIC rate
* 提升至400,000，否则WonderLLM将无法完整接收数据: *        up to 400,000, otherwise WonderLLM will not be able to receive the data completely
tool_name：注册的MCP工具名（保持格式`self`开头，命名一定要清晰: tool_name: the name of the registered MCP tool (keep the format starting with `self`; the name must be clear enough for the large model to know its purpose, and avoid abbreviations)
command：引导大模型何时使用该工具，并对需要回传主机的参数进行介绍: command: guides the large model on when to use this tool and describes the parameters that need to be returned to the host
params：WonderLLM向主机回传的该类型信息帧中包含的参数，格式:[[: params: the parameters contained in the message frame of this type that WonderLLM sends back to the host, in the format: [[param_name_1, param_type, min_value (optional, none for string type), max_value (optional, none for string type)], [param_2...]]
（string表示该参数项具体内容由大模型给出，根据上下文对话决定）: (string means the specific content of this parameter is provided by the large model, decided from the conversation context)
（参数类型目前仅支持string、int、bool）: (the parameter type currently only supports string, int, bool)
return：表示主机是否需要返回数据给WonderLLM: return: indicates whether the host needs to return data to WonderLLM
true-需要，当为true时，block参数项设置不生效，因为return本身: true - required; when true, the block setting has no effect, because return is itself blocking
(使用基础系统指令status，见WonderLLM_Send_Status）: (uses the basic system command status, see WonderLLM_Send_Status)
block：是否为阻塞式执行，若是，则WonderLLM会等待主机回复确认指令执: block: whether execution is blocking; if so, WonderLLM waits for the host to reply confirming the command finished before continuing
true-是，则执行完WonderLLM回传消息帧附带的指令，主机需回复Wond: true - yes; after executing the command carried by WonderLLM's reply message frame, the host must reply to WonderLLM that the command has finished
（使用基础系统指令action_finish，见WonderLLM_Send_A: (uses the basic system command action_finish, see WonderLLM_Send_Action_Finish)
false-不是，WonderLLM通过信息帧向主机下发指令后直接向后执行，不再: false - no; after WonderLLM sends a command to the host via a message frame it continues immediately, no longer caring about the command's execution result
系统指令-MCP注册完成指令: system command - MCP registration complete command
* @brief 将数据帧通过I2C发送出去: * @brief Send the data frame out over I2C
检查数据和长度是否有效: check whether the data and length are valid
直接发送 data 指针指向的内存区域，长度为 len: directly send the memory region pointed to by data, with length len
step1 收取“帧头+长度”并校验: step1 receive the "header + length" and validate it
step1.2 解析帧长度并校验合法性: step1.2 parse the frame length and validate it
控制1个引脚高低电平变化，使用逻辑分析仪同时监测SCL/SDA引脚和该引脚，可以: toggle one pin high/low; using a logic analyzer to monitor the SCL/SDA pins and this pin at the same time makes it easy to locate when the JSON string data is received
step1.3 解析总分片数和当前分片ID: step1.3 parse the total number of fragments and the current fragment ID
* @brief 从I2C接收一个完整的数据帧: * @brief Receive one complete data frame from I2C
step1 接收帧头并校验: step1 receive the frame header and validate it
step2 收取“帧数据+校验位”: step2 receive the "frame data + checksum byte"
如果当前收到的数据包不是第一包，说明前面丢包了，此时收到的是残缺的数据，直接退出: if the currently received packet is not the first one, packets were lost earlier and the data received is incomplete, so exit directly
从第一包开始连续接收全部数据: receive all the data continuously starting from the first packet
每1包数据的校验位会在接收下一包数据接收时被覆盖: the checksum byte of each packet is overwritten when the next packet is received
最后1包数据的校验位会被后续构造字符串的‘\\0’字符覆盖: the checksum byte of the last packet is overwritten by the '\0' character used later to build the string
异常处理，判断读取是否正常: exception handling: determine whether the read was normal
确认校验位合法性: confirm the validity of the checksum byte
校验不合格，清空已经存储的数据并退出: checksum failed; clear the already-stored data and exit
接收下一包数据的帧头，获取下一包数据的长度、切片ID等信息，为下一包数据的接收做: receive the header of the next packet to get its length, fragment ID and other info, preparing to receive the next packet
验证下一包数据分片ID、总分片数: verify the next packet's fragment ID and total fragment count
下一包数据的分片ID与本包不连续，说明发生丢包，直接退出: the next packet's fragment ID is not consecutive with this one, meaning packet loss occurred, so exit directly
数据防溢出处理，避免越界写入: overflow protection for the data, to avoid out-of-bounds writes
* @brief 计算数据的异或校验和: * @brief Compute the XOR checksum of the data
向从机传输一个字节: transmit one byte to the slave

向从机写入若干字节*: write several bytes to the slave*
向从机写入若干字节: write several bytes to the slave

第二部分：水平摆动（x轴移动）: part two: horizontal swing (movement along the x axis)
识别到\"介绍自己\" - 执行卖萌动作: recognized "introduce yourself" - run the act-cute action
沿Y轴正方向前进，同时进行逆时针旋转: move forward along the +Y axis while rotating counterclockwise
沿Y轴正方向前进，同时进行顺时针旋转: move forward along the +Y axis while rotating clockwise
沿X轴和Y轴正方向移动（右上45度方向）: move along the +X and +Y axes (upper-right 45-degree direction)
沿X轴正方向和Y轴负方向移动（右下45度方向）: move along the +X and -Y axes (lower-right 45-degree direction)
沿X轴负方向和Y轴负方向移动（左下45度方向）: move along the -X and -Y axes (lower-left 45-degree direction)
沿X轴负方向和Y轴正方向移动（左上45度方向）: move along the -X and +Y axes (upper-left 45-degree direction)
第一次旋转：低速旋转（1单位速度）: first rotation: low-speed rotation (1 unit of speed)
第二次旋转：中低速旋转（1.5单位速度）: second rotation: medium-low-speed rotation (1.5 units of speed)
第三次旋转：中速旋转（2单位速度）: third rotation: medium-speed rotation (2 units of speed)
第四次旋转：高速旋转（2.5单位速度）: fourth rotation: high-speed rotation (2.5 units of speed)
设置身体在X轴正方向移动3厘米: move the body 3cm along the +X axis
设置身体在Y轴正方向移动3厘米: move the body 3cm along the +Y axis

设置身体在Y轴负方向移动3厘米: move the body 3cm along the -Y axis

设置身体在Y轴负方向移动2厘米，Z轴负方向移动1厘米: move the body 2cm along the -Y axis and 1cm along the -Z axis

设置身体绕X轴旋转-8度（反向Roll）: rotate the body -8 degrees about the X axis (reverse Roll)
设置身体绕Y轴旋转12度（Pitch）: rotate the body 12 degrees about the Y axis (Pitch)

设置身体绕Z轴旋转12度（Yaw）: rotate the body 12 degrees about the Z axis (Yaw)

机器人在xyz三轴上的运动速度: the robot's motion speed along the x, y, z axes
机器人的重心在坐标系下的三维坐标: the 3D coordinate of the robot's center of gravity in the coordinate frame
机器人绕xyz三轴旋转的欧拉角: the Euler angles of the robot's rotation about the x, y, z axes
机器人持续运动标志位: flag for the robot's continuous motion
follow函数专用计数器: counter dedicated to the follow function
avoid函数专用计数器: counter dedicated to the avoid function
用于存储接收到的数据的优先队列，元素为 (priority, data): priority queue used to store received data, with elements of (priority, data)
用于保证相同优先级数据的顺序: used to preserve the order of data with the same priority
存储分片数据，格式为 {fragment_id: [data, total_fr: store fragment data, in the format {fragment_id: [data, total_fragments, received_fragments]}
上次接收分片的时间: the time the last fragment was received
把要发的数据丢进发送队列: put the data to be sent into the send queue
处理分片数据，当所有分片都接收完成后重组数据: process fragment data; reassemble it once all fragments have been received
检查是否超时，如果超时则清空分片缓存: check for a timeout; if timed out, clear the fragment cache
如果是单分片数据，直接返回: if it is single-fragment data, return directly
如果是多分片数据，需要重组: if it is multi-fragment data, it must be reassembled
使用当前时间戳作为分片组的标识，这样可以区分不同的数据组: use the current timestamp as the fragment group's key, so different data groups can be distinguished
只有第一个分片（fragment_id == 1）会创建新的分片组: only the first fragment (fragment_id == 1) creates a new fragment group
创建新的分片组，使用当前时间戳作为键: create a new fragment group, using the current timestamp as the key
如果没有分片组，说明我们错过了第一个分片，忽略当前分片: if there is no fragment group, we missed the first fragment, so ignore the current fragment
获取最新的分片组（即最近创建的分片组）: get the newest fragment group (the most recently created one)
检查分片ID是否有效: check whether the fragment ID is valid
分片ID从1开始，所以需要减1作为数组索引: fragment IDs start at 1, so subtract 1 to use as the array index
分片数据，转换为0-based索引: fragment data, converted to a 0-based index
检查当前分片组的总分片数是否匹配: check whether the total fragment count of the current fragment group matches
只有分片数据（fragment_id >= 1）才需要存储: only fragment data (fragment_id >= 1) needs to be stored
检查是否所有分片都已接收: check whether all fragments have been received
从分片缓存中移除: remove it from the fragment cache
从优先队列中取出一个数据，如果队列空返回None: take one item out of the priority queue; return None if the queue is empty
发送，如果有的话: send it, if there is any
读取头部信息：AA55（帧头）+ 数据长度（2字节）+ 分片ID（2字节）+ 总: read the header info: AA55 (frame header) + data length (2 bytes) + fragment ID (2 bytes) + total fragment count (2 bytes)
检查头部数据是否有效: check whether the header data is valid
检查帧头是否有效: check whether the frame header is valid
检查数据长度是否正确: check whether the data length is correct
如果数据重组完成（对于单分片数据，会立即返回）: if the data reassembly is complete (for single-fragment data it returns immediately)
这里给数据一个优先级，假设所有数据优先级相同为0: assign the data a priority here; assume all data has the same priority of 0
你可以根据data内容自定义优先级: you can customize the priority based on the data content
使用counter保证相同优先级数据的顺序: use counter to preserve the order of data with the same priority
设置mcp，调用mcp时会触发从机返回params格式数据回来，其中string: set up the mcp; calling the mcp triggers the slave to return data in the params format, where the string is provided by the large model based on your conversation with it, e.g. if you ask for the current pose it might return pose
注意command里要描述清楚有哪些返回的选项，return表示是否需要返回数据: note that command should clearly describe the available return options; return indicates whether data needs to be returned to the slave, and if so, the returned data is given as a list per the requirements of send_status
如[[\"pose\", \"0\"], [\"battery\", 8000]: e.g. [["pose", "0"], ["battery", 8000]]; after the slave receives it, it is returned to the large model as-is for it to judge or announce
读取模拟电平，返回值范围0-4095: read the analog level; the return value ranges from 0 to 4095
将ADC电压值转换为模拟电压（分压电阻上的分到的部分电源电压）: convert the ADC voltage value into the analog voltage (the portion of the supply voltage divided across the divider resistor)
分压电阻分到原始电压的1/11: the divider resistor gets 1/11 of the original voltage
低于目标间距但大于临界距离，控制机器人转弯: below the target spacing but above the critical distance, make the robot turn
低于目标间距但大于临界距离，控制机器人停下: below the target spacing but above the critical distance, make the robot stop
不指定步数或运动时长，默认一直走不停下: specify neither step count nor duration; by default keep walking without stopping
这里的单位是s，因此/1000作单位转换: the unit here is seconds, so divide by 1000 for the unit conversion
注意：get_status类型消息检测必须在set_mode类型消息类检测前进行: note: get_status type message detection must be performed before set_mode type message detection,
get_status类型消息检测必须在BaryCenterMove类型消息类检测: get_status type message detection must be performed before BaryCenterMove type message detection, for the same reason as above
函数返回的单位是cm，单位转换为mm: the function returns in cm; convert the unit to mm
限位操作，保证不出现0-255以外的值: clamp operation, to guarantee no values outside 0-255
也可用以下语句替代: the following statement can also be used instead
等待0.1s，给其他的线程预留处理动作组运行指令并设置标志位的响应时间: wait 0.1s to leave other threads response time to handle the action-group run command and set the flag
robot.__action_run在动作组执行时置1，其他时间置0: robot.__action_run is set to 1 while an action group runs, and 0 otherwise
由于接收大模型模块的任务每0.02s执行一次，因此此处主循环延时保持一致，确保指: since the task that receives from the large-model module runs every 0.02s, the main-loop delay here is kept consistent to ensure the command processing rate matches the command receiving rate
